3024450.name: Fantasy Grounds - FG Eastern Medieval 1 Map Pack
3024450.description:
FG Eastern Medieval 1 Map Pack

The Eastern Medieval 1 Map Pack features images and art produced by our in-house artist, Joshua Watmough. They have been organized and optimized for use with Fantasy Grounds Unity and the image tools.
This map pack consists of nearly 100 images that can be used to create or enhance existing maps. This pack includes the following items:
  • Over 30 new brushes of walls, foundations, roof elements, beams, and more
  • Decorations of bamboo fences, beams, boards, stone elements, and more
  • Fills of boards, stone bricks, and cobbled ground
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Joshua Watmough
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and any ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
